chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 7267 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.31851/2021 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2026 Mr. Naveed Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Arshad Hussain Lodhi, Advocate for respondent No.1. M/s. Masroor Ahmed Alvi and Rehan Ahmed, Advocates for respondent No.2. M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. and Sagheer Ahmed Abbasi, AAG. ------------------------------------ After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted about legality as well as maintainability of the petition, he seeks disposal of the petition in terms of the prayer so made and submits that he would approach the department concerned for redressal of his grievance. Learned counsel for the respondents as well learned Addl. A.G. Sindh have no objection. The petition along with listed application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
